title: Implement logging lane #2142-#2148

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement the provenance-aware, segmentable session-log lane in #2142 and children #2144-#2148, then publish it as one draft PR.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep session logs local-only and non-authoritative; preserve originals during repair/export; exclude sibling package-output lane #2143.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement origin/provenance, coverage repair, segmentation, share-safe export, and packet-kind classification with focused fixtures.
proof_expectations: Run AW implement/proof selection for the final changed paths.
touched_scope: session-log operation and CLI command contracts plus generated command surfaces
completion_criteria: Ordinary indexed and Markdown-fallback analysis separates agent friction from expected test/validation failures and separates packet/domain kinds.
Coverage is reported conservatively and repair idempotently backfills Markdown entries without losing existing metadata or artifacts.
Commands carry source provenance and lightweight task/plan/branch/PR segments that can be summarized and selected.
Share-safe export redacts Markdown, index, and included artifacts without mutating originals.
Focused, generated-surface, and routed AW proof pass; a draft PR closes #2142 and #2144-#2148 but not #2143.

goal: Make local AW session-log analysis attributable, segmentable, coverage-aware, and safely exportable for the #2141 dogfooding log class.
non_goals: Do not implement package-output/recovery lane #2143 or children #2149-#2152.
Do not add remote telemetry, arbitrary shell logging, proof authority, or general secret detection.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. closure_check.why this decision is honest: The ordinary local session-log path satisfies parent #2142 and every decomposed child #2144-#2148; #2143 was explicitly a sibling package-output lane.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Focused/broad proof, PR description, #2140 baseline disclosure, and #2153 checker follow-up.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if PR review or dogfooding shows origin attribution, coverage repair, segmentation, export redaction, or kind classification does not work in the ordinary path.
